questions.question: Starting from the red ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first red ball, listing every component it interacts with in order.
questions.answer: The first red ball drops from the red hopper at (8, -1), rolls onto the fixed ramp_left at (8, 1), then ramp_right at (7, 2), ramp_left at (8, 3), ramp_right at (7, 4), ramp_left at (8, 5), ramp_right at (7, 6), fixed ramp_right at (7, 6), ramp_left at (8, 7), ramp_right at (7, 8), ramp_left at (8, 9), ramp_right at (7, 9), exiting at the right side of the board.

questions.question: In what order do balls exit the machine (blue exit, red exit, or intercepted)?
questions.answer: All 8 red balls exit at the red (right) exit. No balls are intercepted.

questions.question: How many total ramps (both fixed and placed) are on the board in the solution?
questions.answer: There are 10 ramps total: 2 fixed ramps in the starting setup and 8 ramps placed by the solution.
